article_title: EF Core 关系建模完全指南：一对多、多对多与一对一
core_theme: EF Core 三种实体关系类型（一对多、一对一、多对多）的建模方式、配置方法和加载策略
reader_takeaway: 掌握 EF Core 三种关系类型的 Fluent API 配置、级联删除选项、显式/隐式多对多选择，以及加载策略的正确用法
summary_angle: 用简洁的连接图展示三种实体关系如何通过外键和导航属性在 EF Core 中映射为数据库约束

information_blocks.source_anchor: 一对多：Blog.HasMany(b => b.Posts).WithOne(p => p.Blog)；原文 One-to-Many 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个 Blog 节点连接到多个 Post 节点，箭头方向从 1 指向 N

information_blocks.source_anchor: 多对多显式连接实体：Student-Enrollment-Course；原文 Many-to-Many 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: Student 和 Course 之间通过 Enrollment 连接表关联，连接表上标注 Grade

information_blocks.source_anchor: 一对一：User.HasOne(u => u.Profile).WithOne(p => p.User)；原文 One-to-One 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: User 和 UserProfile 之间用外键 UserId 关联，双箭头表示唯一对应

information_blocks.source_anchor: 级联删除必须显式配置，不要依赖默认行为；原文 Cascade Delete 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个删除操作触发了依赖实体的级联，旁边标注 Restrict/Cascade 选项

main_metaphor: 实体关系像电路接线图，用清晰线条和节点表示实体间的连接规则
primary_subject: 一个抽象的实体关系接线图，包含 1→N 分支、N↔M 连接表和 1↔1 直连三种拓扑结构
subject_action: 三种关系拓扑同时在画面上以节点+连线的方式呈现，每种关系有标签标注
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从风格池随机选中；关系建模主题适合用极简线条清晰表达实体间的连接拓扑
style_safety_note: 使用泛极简线稿描述，不涉及具体作品、工作室或艺术家
draft_goal: 验证极简线稿风格下三种关系拓扑是否清晰可读，标签是否与拓扑对应
revision_targets: 节点和连线的比例是否协调
颜色区分三种关系类型
可见标签是否与关系拓扑对应
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: EF Core entity relationships -- one-to-many, one-to-one, many-to-many with join entities, and cascade delete options. The reader should quickly understand the three relationship topologies in EF Core.

Summary angle: Show the three EF Core relationship types as a clean entity-relationship wiring diagram, with foreign keys, navigation properties, and cascade delete options.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- One-to-many: Blog has many Posts, labeled '一对多' with '1→N'
- Many-to-many: Student-Enrollment-Course explicit join entity, labeled '多对多' with 'N↔M'
- One-to-one: User-UserProfile with FK UserId, labeled '一对一' with '1↔1'
- Cascade delete: explicit configuration of Restrict/Cascade options, labeled '显式级联' with '4 option'

Main metaphor: Entity relationships as a clean circuit wiring diagram, with nodes and lines representing entity connections.
Subject: An abstract entity relationship wiring diagram showing three topology types -- branching 1→N, join-table N↔M, and direct 1↔1 -- over a clean dark background.
Composition/framing: centered main subject, nodes connected by clean lines spanning horizontally across the wide frame.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: dark gray, cyan blue, warm orange.
Visible text policy: allow only 4 short Chinese labels as specified in information blocks. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, neon skyscraper backgrounds, generic robots, fake dashboard axes, fake architecture node names, code rain, HUD overlays, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, UI screenshots.
